name: gemini-workflows
description: Pre-built content generation workflows using Gemini AI

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run fix-paths
scripts.fix-paths: find dist/workflows -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.d.ts' \) -exec sed -i.bak "s|'\.\./gemini/dist/index\.js'|'../../../gemini/dist/index.js'|g" {} + && find dist/workflows -name '*.bak' -delete

author: Min Khant Soe
